TextView.android:text:
Help improve BBC Radio Player by sharing anonymous analytics.

This data is only used to track the most popular stations, podcasts, and episodes.

📊 What we collect:
• Station/podcast/episode plays
• App version and date

🔒 What we DON'T collect:
• No user IDs or device identifiers
• No personal information
• No location data
• No IP addresses

You can disable analytics any time in Settings → Privacy.
